title: Panchang Day Orchestration Preview
input_flow: AG74K resolved date/location/timezone → AG74M local civil day
sunrise: Astronomy Engine apparent upper limb with standard refraction and level horizon
elevation: 0 m default; approved traceable override only
daily_basis: Tithi, Nakshatra, Yoga, Karana, Paksha and Vara allocated at local sunrise
transitions: Previous and next UTC/local transition times for all four angular elements
skipped_repeated: Detected across consecutive available local sunrises
timezone_examples: Asia/Kolkata, Europe/London, America/New_York, Australia/Sydney and Asia/Tokyo
edge_examples: 23-hour DST day, polar day, polar night and Pacific/Apia skipped civil date
ui_change: None; overflow and typography correction remains AG74O
